reviews.title: Strict publish sync gate
reviews.reviewReason: Owner evidence fields are not submitted: publication_scope, strict_sync_intent.

ownerEvidenceFields.boundary: does not submit evidence or close gates
does not submit evidence or close gates

reviews.forbiddenClaim: This review does not approve gate closure.
reviews.nextAction: Run the runtime-only non-writing strict sync gate after the intended branch is pushed.
reviews.boundary: Committed gap-register snapshots do not close strict sync; only the runtime-only non-writing strict sync audit proves current local upstream sync.

reviews.title: Owner license decision
reviews.reviewReason: Owner evidence fields are not submitted: license_or_no_reuse.

ownerEvidenceFields.boundary: does not submit evidence or close gates

reviews.forbiddenClaim: This review does not approve gate closure.
reviews.nextAction: Owner chooses a reuse license or keeps the no-reuse boundary.
reviews.boundary: Does not choose a license or provide legal advice.

reviews.title: One permissioned external weak artifact
reviews.reviewReason: Owner evidence fields are not submitted: weak_artifact_permission.
requiredBeforeClosure: permissioned or clearly redacted weak artifact

ownerEvidenceFields.boundary: does not submit evidence or close gates

reviews.forbiddenClaim: This review does not approve gate closure.
reviews.nextAction: Collect one user-submitted, permissioned, or clearly redacted weak artifact.
reviews.boundary: Does not create external proof or grant permission.

reviews.title: Completed permissioned before/after case
reviews.reviewReason: Owner evidence fields are not submitted: weak_artifact_permission.
requiredBeforeClosure: permissioned or clearly redacted weak artifact

ownerEvidenceFields.boundary: does not submit evidence or close gates

reviews.forbiddenClaim: This review does not approve gate closure.
reviews.nextAction: Run the reviewed artifact through the full case path and preserve the boundary check.
reviews.boundary: Does not prove improvement, adoption, or outcome until the before/after case evidence exists.

reviews.title: npm package publication
reviews.reviewReason: Owner evidence fields are not submitted: package_action_plugin_scope.

ownerEvidenceFields.boundary: does not submit evidence or close gates

reviews.forbiddenClaim: This review does not approve gate closure.
reviews.nextAction: After license and sync gates close, owner decides whether npm publication is in scope.
reviews.boundary: Dry-run package checks are not npm publication.

reviews.title: Tagged GitHub Action or Marketplace publication
reviews.reviewReason: Owner evidence fields are not submitted: package_action_plugin_scope.

ownerEvidenceFields.boundary: does not submit evidence or close gates

reviews.forbiddenClaim: This review does not approve gate closure.
reviews.nextAction: Owner decides whether a tagged public action release or Marketplace listing is in scope.
reviews.boundary: Repository-local action metadata is not Marketplace publication.

reviews.title: Shipped plugin or connector proof
reviews.reviewReason: Owner evidence fields are not submitted: package_action_plugin_scope.

ownerEvidenceFields.boundary: does not submit evidence or close gates

reviews.forbiddenClaim: This review does not approve gate closure.
reviews.nextAction: Produce a real tagged plugin/action release or installation proof before shipped-plugin claims.
reviews.boundary: Local plugin scaffolds and install-readiness packets are not shipped plugins.

reviews.title: Benchmarked productivity evidence
reviews.reviewReason: Owner evidence fields are not submitted: benchmark_adoption_scope.

ownerEvidenceFields.boundary: does not submit evidence or close gates

reviews.forbiddenClaim: This review does not approve gate closure.
reviews.nextAction: Run the measurement protocol and review the resulting evidence before productivity claims.
reviews.boundary: Measurement protocol only; no benchmark claim without direct evidence.

reviews.title: External adoption evidence
reviews.reviewReason: Owner evidence fields are not submitted: benchmark_adoption_scope.

ownerEvidenceFields.boundary: does not submit evidence or close gates

reviews.forbiddenClaim: This review does not approve gate closure.
reviews.nextAction: Collect and review real external usage evidence before adoption claims.
reviews.boundary: Read-only public repository visibility is not external adoption.

allowedClaim: Mimesis has a local gate closure review record that keeps every current gate open until direct closure evidence is reviewed.
disallowedClaim: The gate closure review record does not approve gate closure, close gates, submit evidence, attach evidence, publish, choose a license, create external proof, prove adoption, prove benchmarked productivity, or ship a plugin.
